headline: Crude oil turns positive for the week, climbs above $100 per barrel
summary: CNBC's Pippa Stevens joins 'Closing Bell Overtime' with a recap on the week's energy moves as oil climbs above $100 per barrel.

headline: Valero Energy Shares Follow Crack Spreads Higher (Rating Upgrade)
summary: Valero Energy has surged over 40% in 2026, reaching an all-time high of $254.68 amid soaring oil prices and refining margins. Find out why VLO is a Strong Buy.

headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Steady As Rate Hike Worries Build
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Friday, Mar, 27 2026 US stock futures are mixed in early trading, with S&P 500 contracts roughly flat while volatility futures edge higher around 26, a sign investors are bracing for choppier sessions. The key driver is a jump in government bond yields worldwide, from Germany’s 10 year above 3.1% to the US 10 year around 4.41%, as markets scale back expectations of interest rate cuts and even assign roughly a 50% chance of a US rate hike by...

headline: Rising oil prices could increase food costs—but hoarding groceries ‘makes a bad situation worse,’ economist says
summary: Rising oil prices can take months to filter into grocery bills, and the impact is often smaller than consumers expect.
